description: Simmons attempts to comfort Elena, who is anxious about her condition and its ramifications. But suddenly, a rift-induced manifestation attacks, putting Elena in grave danger. Mack rushes in, and Fitz recognizes that the rift’s effects are intensifying, prompting the team to accelerate their response.

transcript.line: Bad dreams? The hydromorphone makes you drowsy, but the sleep can be restless.
Please don't dope me up more. I need to stay clear-headed, to warn Mack.
That the pain is just beginning? He knows. And you should spare him. He's suffered enough. We've all suffered enough.
We can't wait any longer. We have to try and seal it now. It's getting way too dangerous in here.
